description: Ghana ICUMS adapter. File-drop intake (operator drops batch JSON files into BatchDropPath; adapter indexes them by container number) + file-based outbox for verdicts. Mirrors the v1 NSCIM deployment topology — no direct HTTP to ICUMS in this first cut. JSON shape matches v1's BOEScanDocument contract (ManifestDetails / BoeHeader / ContainerDetails / ManifestItems).

BatchDropPath.description: Directory the adapter scans for ICUMS batch JSON files. Each file is expected to follow the BOEScanDocument schema (root .BOEScanDocument array). Files are re-read when their mtime changes.

OutboxPath.description: Directory where verdict envelopes are written. One file per submission, named {idempotencyKey}.json — re-submitting with the same key overwrites the file, providing at-most-once semantics.

CacheTtlSeconds.description: How often the BatchDropPath is re-scanned for new/changed files.
